summary.key_theme: 公司近期連續獲得中東國防訂單與邊境安全合約，並透過策略投資 World View 強化無人機與偵察技術布局，帶動市場對其國防科技實力的強勁信心。

bullish.title: Ondas Subsidiary Receives $20M Purchase Order Under Strategic National Government Tender To Develop And Deploy Multi-Year Autonomous Border Protection System
bullish.reason: 獲得 2,000 萬美元的重大邊境保護系統訂單，直接挹注營收並驗證其 AI 無人機技術在國防領域的實戰價值。

bullish.title: Ondas Receives ~$6M Orders For Counter-Drone Systems From Its Current Defense, Homeland Security Clients In Middle East
bullish.reason: 在中東市場持續擴大反無人機系統部署，顯示公司產品具備高度客戶黏著度與持續性的國防需求。

bullish.title: Ondas Makes $10M Strategic Investment In World View; Signs Partnership Agreement Outlining Collaboration Framework For Development Of Multi-Domain And Multi-Modal ISR Solutions
bullish.reason: 透過 1,000 萬美元投資 World View，整合平流層感測與戰術無人機技術，擴展多領域情報偵察（ISR）解決方案。

bullish.title: Palantir May Be The Brain Of AI Warfare — But Ondas Is Building The Hardware
bullish.reason: 將 Ondas 定位為 AI 戰爭中的硬體核心供應商，提升了市場對其在國防供應鏈中關鍵地位的認知。

bullish.title: Trump Said US Is Ready To 'WIN BIG' In Iran With 'Unlimited' Munitions. Then These Two Drone Stocks Took Off
bullish.reason: 受地緣政治言論與國防預算預期影響，帶動無人機類股整體上漲，反映市場情緒轉向國防軍工板塊。

bullish.title: Ondas: From Penny Stock To Defense Contender
bullish.reason: 分析師觀點轉向，認可公司從小型股轉型為具備實質競爭力的國防供應商，有助於吸引機構投資人關注。
